allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('tests:',len\(d\)\); t=d[0]; print\('removed keys present?', any\(k in t for k in \('description','meaning_if_high','meaning_if_low'\)\)\); print\('Hb meaning_high_simple:', t['family_guidance']['meaning_high_simple'][:60]\)")
